## Only the Best for Your Ears

### From the International Market Leader!

Are you interested in having your ears pierced? Don’t just go anywhere. Make sure to look for original STUDEX®quality that you will enjoy for the rest of your life. Our STUDEX partners — jewelry stores, beauty salons, piercing studios, hair dressers, doctors, and pharmacies — use our state-of-the-art instruments and offer the latest technology, sterile handling and gorgeous piercing studs.

**Stylish and safe—right from the start.**

![Image 7: earring trends 2026](https://www.studex.eu/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Noir-Row-Mix_2025-2_sm.jpg)
